Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl

Class ViewElectionCycleAnomalyPattern

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.impl.ViewElectionCycleAnomalyPattern
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject, java.io.Serializable
@Entity(name="ViewElectionCycleAnomalyPattern") public class ViewElectionCycleAnomalyPattern extends java.lang.Object implements com.hack23.cia.model.common.api.ModelObject
The Class ViewElectionCycleAnomalyPattern. Anomaly and pattern detection aggregates across election cycles.
Since:
v1.51 (Election Cycle Analytics)
Author:
intelligence-operative
